positive: A stylized, highly contrasting geometric illustration featuring a central, stylized mountain range silhouette under a vibrant, abstract nebula sky. The composition should be perfectly centered, suitable for a t-shirt graphic. Use bold, limited color palette: deep indigo, cosmic purple, electric teal, and stark white accents. Incorporate clean, interconnected geometric lines and subtle pattern overlays on the mountain foothills and sky to add depth without clutter. The style should mimic modern graphic design and retro-futuristic screen printing, ensuring crisp edges and excellent print contrast. Clean lines, negative space utilization is key. Aspect ratio square.
negative: blur, watermark, signature, text, logo, messy, noisy, grainy, artifacts, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, realistic photo, poor composition
